string 2: Forest patrol time, Big Bro!
Forest patrol time, Little Bro!
We're so cool, huh! Like, really working hard!

Yeah! We're gonna keep this place safe, just like the
legendary heroes!

Yeah! We're gonna keep this place safe, just like the
legendary heroes!
{next}Titans are really strong.
{next}What's this about legendary heroes?
{end}Well, good luck! See you!

But we're strong, too! We've got a brotherly bond just like
the legendary heroes!

A pair of heroes who once fought for peace here! We wanna be
just like 'em!

Hey, somebody passing by just cheered us on! C'mon! Let's
show 'em what we got! Dig, dig!

Word has it the legendary heroes were brothers. Just like
us!

And they fought the good fight, just the two of 'em. That's
what makes 'em the coolest!

Okay, time to go take out those leftover Titans! Let's head
that way and—

Hold up, Big Bro! We should go take down the one over this
way first!

Nuh-uh. This way first! It's already decided! Now, just shut
up and follow me!

No way! Why do you always get to decide?! I wanna go the
other way! And I'm gonna!

Grrr... So you'd go against your own older brother, huh? I
see how it is!

This brotherly team is officially disbanded! I don't care
what you do from now on.
Fine by me! Because I'm gonna do whatever I want.

That'll restore peace way faster! You're always so pushy,
and it's been bugging me!

You're really bringing that up now? Ugh, I can't stand you!
Now we're REALLY through!

I'm leaving! And just you watch! I'm gonna take out those
Titans in a flash. Not us, ME!

As if I care! I'm leaving, too. I'll beat the Titans all by
myself!

Uh-oh. Going it alone isn't so easy... Hmm? Hey, I remember
you! You look pretty strong!

I know! Let's join forces. There's a Titan holdout over
there!
{next}Okay.
{end}Hold on.
Yay! Thanks a lot. This'll be a huge help!

Guess you need to prep, huh? I'll wait here, so let me know
when you're ready.
Are you ready? Let's go take out that Titan!
{next}Okay.
{end}Hold on.
Yay! Thanks a lot. This'll be a huge help!
All right. Come back when you're ready!

All right, then. Let's go. But stay on your toes. That Titan
looks pretty strong!
*panting* W-We did it. We won!

Wonder how Big Bro is doing... We were always together. I
can't believe it came to this...

I'm gonna head to the sanctuary of the legendary heroes to
think. Thanks again!

Aw, man! I said some awful things back there. Hm? You're the
tough-looking one from before!

You got some time, right? Let's team up! I'm on my way to
take out a leftover Titan.
{next}Okay.
{end}Hold on.

Seriously? Thanks! This is a huge help! I really need you in
my corner.

Need to get ready? Okay, I'll be waiting here, so hurry back
soon!
Hey, you ready? Let's do this!
{next}Okay.
{end}Hold on.

Seriously? Thanks! This is a huge help! I really need you in
my corner.
All right. Come back when you're ready!
Keep your guard up, you hear? Now, let's move out!
...W-We won. Wahoo! We won!
We did it, Little Br— Oh, right. I forgot...

Thank for your help. I'm gonna head to the sanctuary of the
legendary heroes and think.

*sigh* I didn't need to say all that. Now what should I do?
Oh, hey. It's you.

The sanctuary of the legendary heroes, where they swore an
oath as brothers...

...I bet they wouldn't want someone like me here, a guy who
just argued with his brother.
Little Bro!
Big Bro!
Whew... Glad to see you're still in one piece.
Um... Big Bro...? I-I...
...Huh? What's this? There's something buried here.

Oh, yeah. I can see it, just barely sticking out. Now I'm
curious. Let's dig it up!

It's a little box. Pretty light, though, so it can't be
anything too valuable.
Let's take a peek inside anyway.
Careful, Big Bro!
I know, I know. Well, here goes nothing!
Hey, it opened... Now, what's inside...?

What the heck? All that's in here is a wrinkly old scrap of
paper!

Is that it? No little figurines in capsules? No sparkly or
not-so-sparkly cards?

Not a single exciting collector's item to be found! Just
this scrap of paper.

What gives...? Did somebody accidentally bury their trash by
mistake?

...Oh. Hey, get a look at this. There's something written on
the paper!

Whoa, you're right! Let's see... "Let's bring peace to Iliad
together, the two of us!"
There's more. Hmm...

"Side by side as brothers forever!" and "We're stronger when
it's the both of us!"
H-Hey, could this be...
...something written by the legendary heroes?!

Y-You think so, too? That's what I thought! I mean, it's
gotta be!
Awesome! This is a historic discovery!

But why would we find it now of all times, when it's been
buried like that for so long?

What if the legendary heroes were trying to tell us that
brothers need to stick together?
...Yeah.

Little Bro, I'm sorry. I should've considered your feelings
more.

I'm sorry, too, Big Bro. I didn't mean what I said about you
bugging me.

The brotherly breakup is called off! We're better off
working as a team.

You know it, Big Bro! The legendary heroes combined their
strength as brothers.

So let's do the same. That way, we can fight for peace
together!

This note will be our treasure, a symbol of the lesson we
learned from the heroes.
...Oh, right. And we owe you, big time.

If it weren't for you, I might've lost to that Titan and
never seen my brother again.

You bailed out my little bro, too? Now even more thanks is
in order. Here. Take this!

We'll be fine now. We're in this fight together, just like
the legendary heroes!

Sorry for keeping you like this. You must have your own
stuff to take care of, right?

And we'll take care of things here! We all have to do our
part to bring peace to Iliad!
